news.serializers¶

serializers.py - DRF serializers for the News application.

Serializers¶

PublisherSerializer - full publisher details UserSerializer - safe read-only user representation ArticleSerializer - article with nested author/publisher info NewsletterSerializer - newsletter with nested articles ArticleApprovalSerializer - minimal write serializer for approval RegisterSerializer - new user registration

class news.serializers.ArticleApprovalSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Serializer

Serialiser for the internal /api/approved/ POST endpoint. Validates the payload sent by the post_save signal.

class news.serializers.ArticleSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Full Article serialiser. - Read: returns nested author and publisher objects. - Write: accepts author_id and publisher_id as plain integer IDs.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

extra_kwargs = {'author': {'write_only': True}, 'publisher': {'required': False, 'write_only': True}}¶
fields = ['id', 'title', 'content', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'approved', 'author', 'author_detail', 'publisher', 'publisher_detail']¶
model¶

alias of Article

read_only_fields = ['id', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'approved', 'author_detail', 'publisher_detail']¶
validate_author(user)[source]¶

Only journalists may author articles.

class news.serializers.NewsletterSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Newsletter serialiser. - articles accepts a list of Article PKs on write. - articles_detail returns nested article objects on read.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

extra_kwargs = {'articles': {'required': False, 'write_only': True}, 'author': {'write_only': True}}¶
fields = ['id', 'title', 'description', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'author', 'author_detail', 'articles', 'articles_detail']¶
model¶

alias of Newsletter

read_only_fields = ['id', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'author_detail', 'articles_detail']¶
class news.serializers.PublisherSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Serialises a Publisher for list and detail views.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

fields = ['id', 'name', 'description', 'website', 'created_at']¶
model¶

alias of Publisher

read_only_fields = ['id', 'created_at']¶
class news.serializers.RegisterSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Serialiser used for new user registration via the API.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

extra_kwargs = {'publisher': {'required': False}}¶
fields = ['username', 'email', 'first_name', 'last_name', 'role', 'publisher', 'password', 'password2']¶
model¶

alias of CustomUser

create(validated_data)[source]¶

Create a new user with a hashed password.

validate(data)[source]¶

Ensure the two password fields match.

class news.serializers.UserSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Read-only serialiser exposing non-sensitive user information. Used for nested representations inside Article and Newsletter.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

fields = ['id', 'username', 'first_name', 'last_name', 'email', 'role']¶
model¶

alias of CustomUser

read_only_fields = ['id', 'username', 'first_name', 'last_name', 'email', 'role']¶

NewsApp
